stat_block.text: This bedroll is made of especially fine cotton, stuffed with goose down, and the hem is inscribed with the sigils of the Dreamlands. If you fall asleep in the bedroll, you gain 5 temporary Hit Points that last while you sleep and for 1 minute after you wake up, as well as a +1 status bonus to saves against mental effects that occur while you are asleep, such as the *nightmare* spell.

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.
